chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 869 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on CMA No.3873/2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No.3874/2024. 12.02.2026 Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate files power on behalf of applicant, same is taken on record, and under instructions does not press this reference application, which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
